First check source_relative_visual_baseline: product-quality judgement is invalid if visual_region_metrics lacks source extraction coverage or if generated regions cannot be compared against current-run source font/line evidence. Check that visible source headings, years, bullets, and separator labels remain hard anchors: target-language text after an anchor must not be reflowed above it. A critical title, banner, body, table, image/color, or side-navigation role failure in visual_region_metrics is a blocking product-quality failure even if the page-level visual impression is mostly similar. Check background_delta evidence: redaction fill must match the surrounding region background, not the source glyph color; visible color blocks behind translated text require background_fill_resample. Check body_flow evidence: source paragraph gaps should produce paragraph separators, short same-column continuations should not split the article into tiny fallback fragments, fluid body_flow should use target_composition instead of tiny source-bbox fitting when the target language expands, and failed textbox fit attempts must not leave rendered residue. Check event_card evidence on mixed image/text timeline or milestone pages: event descriptions must stay local to their year/image anchor, should not merge into body_flow, and must not overlap adjacent event cards. If already-target-language source spans were preserved/redrawn, verify they do not overlap the recomposed body and are reported separately from semantic translation coverage. If the candidate contains line-category pseudo translations such as 'This line reports...' or '本行说明...', classify that as semantic_translation_authenticity failure and route to S_FAIL_CAPABILITY or S5 repair, not as a layout-only issue. For rotated side navigation, require a back-rotated output crop; it must become readable horizontal target-language text to pass sidebar_glyph_orientation. Output gate findings, blocking status, repair hints, and next_state.
